creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
Replaying comment that got lost due to January 2015 Bugzilla database issue:

I am closing this as fixed, since we have not been forcing linking
as suggested in comment #1 by design so far.  This may change at one
point.  Until then best employ USE_GCC=yes (or similar) in ports or
the options described in later comments if building manually.
